codeReview.summary: The feature adds a final evidence artifact with strong local run and branch-protection snapshots, but it does not satisfy the required immutable same-revision remote-check proof for the asserted SHA.

issues.description: The artifact is anchored to revision 756ec61dfd0a064d538b4adb912fd8a7ae6e2cc9, but it does not include immutable remote check-run IDs/URLs for lint, vitest, pytest, and playwright on that same revision. This misses the feature expected behavior requiring same-SHA required-check evidence.

branchProtectionAssessment marks required checks as configured from protection contexts alone, without cross-validating that those exact context identities were produced and completed for the asserted revision; this can overstate end-state confidence if context names drift.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ci-gate-worker procedure is missing an explicit same-SHA remote check-run proof step before declaring final confidence-gate evidence complete.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ci-gate-worker/SKILL.md step 5 only says to collect evidence generally; transcript skeleton for this feature shows no successful immutable check-run evidence capture for revision 756ec61... despite expected behavior requiring check-run IDs/URLs per required context.

summary: Fail: implementation provides local green/stability evidence and branch-protection configuration, but does not provide immutable same-revision remote required-check proof for the asserted SHA.
